title: Rick Buy
compiled_truth: Rick Buy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-19), Rick Buy sent 762 and received 1898 emails, totalling 2660 interactions. Top correspondents: [Ted Murphy](people/ted-murphy) (89), [David Gorte](people/david-gorte) (73), [David Port](people/david-port) (59), [William Bradford](people/william-bradford) (55), [S  Bradford](people/s-bradford) (47). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, calendar, inbox, sent, sent_items, tasks.
